name: @vexa/desktop
description: The meetings all-in-one host (dual-lane): capture.v1 ingest WS → gmeet-pipeline (per-channel, glow-named) OR mixed-pipeline (zoom/teams/youtube — pyannote-cut, hint-named) → real STT → gateway /transcripts. One process, no Docker/Postgres/Redis. The bricks the cloud splits across services, composed as one deployable.

scripts.test: tsx src/recording-sink.test.ts && tsx src/recording-e2e.test.ts && tsx src/health.test.ts && tsx src/access.test.ts && tsx src/desktop-e2e.live.test.ts
